description_long: This parcel locker is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed primarily from dark, industrial metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. It features four open shelves, each containing several brown cardboard parcel boxes of varying sizes, neatly arranged within the compartments. The sides of the unit are solid panels, fastened with visible rivets or bolts, enhancing its sturdy, secure look. The front and back are open, allowing easy access to the parcels, while the shelves themselves are made of the same dark metal as the frame. There are no visible digital interfaces, branding, or signage on the exterior. The overall design is functional and straightforward, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or garages.
description: A tall, dark metal shelving unit with open shelves containing brown cardboard parcel boxes, featuring solid riveted side panels and an industrial, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves with multiple brown cardboard parcel boxes visible and accessible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid black metal panel with evenly spaced rivets, no visible compartments or boxes.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open shelves and parcel boxes from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid black metal panel with rivets, mirroring the other side.
attribute_access_door_design: Open-front metal shelves with no visible doors; parcels are placed directly on the shelves.
